label: Quote / Testimonial
description: A featured quote or testimonial from a community member or partner.

settings.label: Quote
settings.default: Knowing my neighbors made all the difference during the wildfire.

settings.quote: When the grid went out last summer, my block coordinator had medication delivered within an hour. We'd never met before that. Now they feel like family.
PNEC is the gold standard for grassroots community preparedness in San Diego County. Their block-coordinator network is the model we point other cities to.
I signed up to help one weekend a year. Five years later, I know every household on my block by name. It's the most meaningful thing I do in this town.
